name: peptide-binding-metrics
description: Physics-based scoring pipeline for peptide-protein complexes. Cleans and protonates the input structure, runs implicit-solvent MD relaxation (AMBER ff14SB + OBC2), computes a full suite of binding metrics on the relaxed structure (interaction energy, interface geometry, electrostatics, backbone quality, pre/post RMSD), and generates a per-structure CSV + Markdown scorecard. Cyclic peptide topology is auto-detected.

INPUT_COMPLEX: Input filename inside INPUT_DIR (single mode only)
BATCH_MODE: Process all CIF/PDB files in INPUT_DIR (false = single file via INPUT_COMPLEX)
PEPTIDE_CHAIN: Peptide chain ID override (empty = auto-detect smallest chain)
RECEPTOR_CHAIN: Receptor chain ID override (empty = auto-detect by Cα contacts)
MD_DURATION_PS: MD simulation duration in picoseconds (0 = minimisation only)
SOLVENT_MODEL: Implicit solvent model: obc2 or gbn2
DEVICE: OpenMM compute device: cuda or cpu
REPORT_SUMMARY: Write a Markdown scorecard (*_report.md) alongside the CSV
